parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I take for this paragraph: (A) sentence-level copyediting and clarity, (B) checking argument/claim consistency and whether the reported numbers support the claims, or (C) reframing the contribution/novelty claim? You can choose one or multiple.

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified, so I will explicitly state uncertainties about the desired type of feedback until you choose a focus.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid asserting conclusions (e.g., on novelty or empirical validity) that extend beyond what can be supported by this paragraph alone.
rationale.RX.3: I will keep any subsequent work constrained to this single paragraph and the selected focus area(s).
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid introducing wording or suggestions that could misrepresent performance, deployment safety, or user-data implications.
rationale.RX.5: Any observations will be directly tied to specific sentences or phrases in the provided paragraph for traceability.
